description.ko: 햇빛에 바랜 강바닥과 갈라진 대지를 고해상도 매크로 촬영으로 담아내어, 마치 살아있는 행성의 복잡한 순환 계통을 연상시키며 지질학적 부식과 형성의 가공되지 않은 아름다움을 보여줍니다.
description.en: A high-resolution macro capture of sun-baked riverbeds and cracked earth, resembling the intricate circulatory system of a living planet, showcasing the raw beauty of geological decay and formation.

prompt: High-resolution satellite photography of earth textures, arid desert topography with intricate riverbed patterns, cracked clay soil, cinematic lighting, earthy tones, 8k, hyper-detailed, organic geological formations, aerial view of abstract landscape art created by nature.
